span.p:
8-12 weeks before
target account list,
meeting thesis, event objective

div.style: color: rgb(12, 74, 110) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
2-4 weeks before
invite target roles,
partners, distributors

div.style: color: rgb(12, 74, 110) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
During event
capture account, role,
problem, trigger, next step

div.style: color: rgb(12, 74, 110) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
24-72 hours after
route by fit, demand state,
role, evidence strength

div.style: color: rgb(12, 74, 110) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
1-3 weeks after
content hub, consultation,
sample, audit, partner follow-up

div.style: color: rgb(12, 74, 110) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
4-8 weeks after
progression and opportunity review
